title: Browser tab favicon is still the Svelte default logo
what_you_tried: Inspected the served HTML on /auslage-einreichen — looked for <link rel="icon"> and the imported asset
what_happened: The +layout.svelte imports favicon from $lib/assets/favicon.svg, and that file is still the Svelte logo (orange ff3e00 with title 'svelte-logo'). Every browser tab, bookmark, taskbar pin, and history entry shows the Svelte logo, not Folge der Wolke.
what_you_expected: An FdW-branded favicon (the rosa #be185d mark from /apple-touch-icon.svg, scaled and refined for small sizes)
suggested_fix: Replace src/lib/assets/favicon.svg with a real FdW favicon. As an interim, copy static/apple-touch-icon.svg over it. Ideally generate a multi-resolution ICO + monochrome SVG variant from the new icon master.

title: Manifest icons are SVG-only — Android Chrome + iOS won't render correctly
what_you_tried: Read the manifest, checked Android/iOS PWA icon requirements
what_happened: All four icon entries are image/svg+xml. Android Chrome installs PWAs with a Chrome-default fallback icon when no PNG is offered (or downsamples the SVG inconsistently). iOS ignores SVG entirely for the home-screen icon AND for the splash-screen synthesis.
what_you_expected: PNG variants for at least 192/512/180 (apple-touch). SVG can stay alongside as 'any' with sizes='any', but PNGs must be present.
suggested_fix: Generate static/icons/icon-192.png, icon-512.png, icon-192-maskable.png, icon-512-maskable.png, and static/apple-touch-icon.png from a single SVG master (sharp / playwright screenshot / online icon generator). Add them to the manifest icons array. Switch the apple-touch-icon <link> in src/app.html to the PNG.

title: Mobile tab bar 'Neu' FAB is permanently disabled
what_you_tried: Opened /app on iPhone 12 (390x844), tapped the rightmost tab '+ Neu'
what_happened: Button is rendered with disabled attribute and aria-label 'Schnell hinzufügen (Phase 4)'. Tapping does nothing. It's the single most prominent affordance on every admin screen on mobile.
what_you_expected: A bottom-sheet menu with 4 quick actions: Auslage einreichen, Neue Spende, Neue Rechnung, Neues Mitglied (or at minimum a real link to /app/transactions/neu)
suggested_fix: Wire to a Vaul-Svelte bottom sheet or a simple <Sheet> with 4 items. Until a sheet exists, even a plain <a href='/app/transactions/neu'> is better than disabled. Remove disabled + (Phase 4) tooltip.

title: Manifest is missing shortcuts — long-press on icon does nothing useful
what_you_tried: Searched the manifest for a 'shortcuts' array; checked Chromium + Android behaviour
what_happened: No shortcuts defined. Long-pressing the installed home-screen icon on Android shows only generic 'Open app' / 'App info'. The Kassenwart can't jump straight to Audit Inbox, EÜR, or Neue Spende.
what_you_expected: 4 shortcuts: Audit Inbox, Neue Spende, Auslage einreichen, EÜR aktuelles Jahr
suggested_fix: Add the shortcuts array per the proposed manifest in 2026-05-19-deepdive-pwa-mobile.md §2. Each needs a 96x96 PNG glyph in static/icons/. Routes already exist; add ?source=shortcut for analytics.

title: Manifest missing share_target — can't share receipts INTO the app
what_you_tried: Checked manifest; reviewed AuslagenForm's submission shape (multipart/form-data with beleg, bezeichnung_display, kommentar_display)
what_happened: Manifest has no share_target. On Android, a user with a receipt PDF in Gmail / Files / Drive cannot tap Share → Folge der Wolke to deposit it directly into the Auslagen form.
what_you_expected: share_target wired to /auslage-einreichen?source=share, mapping shared text/title/files onto the form's existing fields
suggested_fix: Add the share_target block from the proposed manifest. In +page.server.ts, when source=share is present, parse the multipart payload and pre-populate the rendered form. AuslagenForm needs a prefilled prop. Roughly 1 evening of work.

title: No Background Sync for the public Auslagen form
what_you_tried: Searched the source for BackgroundSync / sync.register / workbox-background-sync
what_happened: No usage. If an Externe submits with flaky network (U-Bahn, festival venue), the request fails and the IndexedDB draft persists but no automatic retry happens.
what_you_expected: Workbox BackgroundSyncPlugin wired to POST /auslage-einreichen; on iOS (no Background Sync API) fall back to a window 'online' event retry from the IndexedDB draft.
suggested_fix: Switch vite-pwa to strategies:'injectManifest', author src/service-worker.ts, register BackgroundSyncPlugin('fdw-auslage-queue', { maxRetentionTime: 24*60 }) on POST /auslage-einreichen. On iOS, listen for 'online' in AuslagenForm and replay the draft. Show a 'Offline — wird beim nächsten Online gesendet' banner driven by navigator.onLine.

title: start_url is /app — Externe installing from /auslage-einreichen lands on /sign-in
what_you_tried: Mentally walked through the install flow for an Externe who opens /auslage-einreichen on iOS Safari and adds to home screen
what_happened: After install, tapping the icon opens /app, which redirects to /sign-in?reason=public-form-coming-soon (because the user isn't authed). They never reach the form they tried to install.
what_you_expected: Either: (a) start_url depends on install context, or (b) /app gracefully redirects unauth'd users to /auslage-einreichen rather than /sign-in.
suggested_fix: Pragmatic fix: change start_url to /app?source=pwa and add a server-side rule in /app/+layout.server.ts that, if not authed AND source=pwa, redirects to /auslage-einreichen instead of /sign-in. The admin install flow on a Kassenwart's phone is unaffected because they'll be authed.

title: Transaktionen filter chips overflow horizontally at 390 px
what_you_tried: Loaded /app/transactions at iPhone 12 (390x844)
what_happened: The filter chip row 'Alle / Ausgaben 0 / Einnahmen 0 / Spenden 0' clips: 'Spenden' is half-cut at the right edge. No horizontal scroll affordance.
what_you_expected: All chips visible, or a horizontally scrollable chip row with a fade-edge hint.
suggested_fix: Wrap the chip row in <div class='flex gap-2 overflow-x-auto -mx-4 px-4 snap-x flex-nowrap'>. Add scroll-snap-align:start on each chip. Optionally add a mask-image fade on the right edge.

title: Tables don't degrade to cards on mobile — TransactionsList is the canonical case
what_you_tried: Reviewed TransactionsList.svelte; checked the only md:hidden / sm:hidden patterns in src/lib/components/admin/
what_happened: Only the AdminShell uses responsive show/hide. The <table> in TransactionsList wraps in overflow-x-auto but at 390 px the columns Typ/Bezeichnung/Betrag/Datum/Status/Festgeschrieben squish unreadably. Mitglieder and Projekte already use cards (good); Transaktionen does not.
what_you_expected: Cards-on-mobile (md:hidden) + table-on-md+ pattern, where each card shows: Bezeichnung (bold), Betrag (right-aligned, large), Datum/Status (small below), bezahlt_von chip.
suggested_fix: Add a <TransactionCardMobile> component, render it inside <div class='md:hidden'> and keep the existing <table> inside <div class='hidden md:block'>. Reuse the row data — no API changes needed.

title: Topbar 'Folge der Wolke' title wastes vertical space on mobile
what_you_tried: Loaded /app on iPhone 12, measured the Topbar height
what_happened: On mobile the Topbar shows 'Folge der Wolke' inline-flex with the search + bell + avatar. The brand wordmark duplicates the home-screen icon below and steals ~56 px of viewport for content.
what_you_expected: On mobile, drop the brand wordmark — leave only the search icon, bell, and avatar. The user already knows what app they're in.
suggested_fix: Add hidden md:inline on the <span> at line 259 (currently sm:hidden — flipped meaning). Or remove it entirely on mobile and replace with just the page title from a $page store.

title: InstallPrompt dismissal not persisted — re-prompts every reload
what_you_tried: Read InstallPrompt.svelte source
what_happened: On dismiss, sets dismissed=true in-memory only. Reload → beforeinstallprompt fires again → button shows again. Annoying once you've decided 'not now'.
what_you_expected: Persist dismissal for 30 days like IosInstallHint does (localStorage with timestamp).
suggested_fix: On dismiss, localStorage.setItem('fdw.install-dismissed-at', String(Date.now())). On mount, gate visibility by Date.now() - parsed > 30*24*3600*1000.

title: Service worker update poll interval is 60 s — overkill for this scale
what_you_tried: Read UpdateAvailableToast.svelte
what_happened: setInterval(() => r.update(), 60_000) — every minute, a background fetch checks for a new SW. 1-3 admins x ~10 min sessions x 1440 polls/day = silly overhead.
what_you_expected: 5-10 min polling — still well within 'next session sees the update' UX expectations.
suggested_fix: Change 60 * 1000 to 5 * 60 * 1000 (or 10 * 60 * 1000). Cuts SW update traffic by ~5-10x without UX cost.

title: Runtime cache covers only /api/* with 60 s SWR — leaves offline value on the table
what_you_tried: Read vite.config.ts SvelteKitPWA workbox.runtimeCaching
what_happened: Single runtime rule: all /api/* GETs cached SWR for 60 s, max 100 entries. 60 s is too short to be useful for the dashboard (U-Bahn admin sees blank). Static assets in /icons and /screenshots have no rule.
what_you_expected: Per-endpoint TTLs: dashboard 5 min, members/projects 30 min, recent tx 10 min, fallback /api/* 60 s. Static art CacheFirst 30 days.
suggested_fix: Replace runtimeCaching with the 5-rule block proposed in 2026-05-19-deepdive-pwa-mobile.md §3. Confirm none of the cached endpoints leak personally identifiable data — dashboard contains member emails so consider scoping it tighter or stripping PII server-side.

title: Externe IBAN input doesn't auto-uppercase or constrain to bank chars
what_you_tried: Read BezahltVonPicker IBAN field config
what_happened: inputmode='text' autocomplete='off' — fine, but no autocapitalize, no pattern, no spellcheck=false. On iOS the keyboard offers spelling suggestions for 'DE89370400440532013000'.
what_you_expected: autocapitalize='characters' (forces caps on letters), spellcheck='false' (no suggestions), pattern='[A-Z0-9 ]+' (HTML validation hint).
suggested_fix: Add autocapitalize='characters' spellcheck='false' pattern='[A-Z0-9 ]+' to the IBAN <input>. Optionally strip spaces on blur and re-format every 4 chars with a single regex.

title: apple-touch-icon is SVG — iOS may not render it as the home-screen icon
what_you_tried: Read app.html and the apple-touch-icon source
what_happened: <link rel='apple-touch-icon' href='/apple-touch-icon.svg'>. iOS 17+ ostensibly accepts SVG, but real-device behaviour is inconsistent (renders blank or downsamples poorly). Splash screens are generated from this icon — SVG splash generation is broken on most iOS versions.
what_you_expected: 180x180 PNG at /apple-touch-icon.png
suggested_fix: Export static/apple-touch-icon.svg to a 180x180 PNG (sharp, ImageMagick, or browser-based export). Replace the <link> in app.html to point to the PNG. Keep the SVG around for reference.

title: Missing mobile-web-app-capable meta (the non-Apple replacement)
what_you_tried: Read app.html meta tags
what_happened: Only <meta name='apple-mobile-web-app-capable' content='yes'> is set. The Apple form is deprecated in favour of the unprefixed <meta name='mobile-web-app-capable' content='yes'> (recognised by Chromium-based browsers).
what_you_expected: Both meta tags present (Apple form for legacy iOS, unprefixed for modern Chrome / Edge / Samsung)
suggested_fix: Add <meta name='mobile-web-app-capable' content='yes' /> alongside the apple- variant. 1-line change.

title: Manifest orientation locked to portrait — kills iPad landscape use
what_you_tried: Read manifest orientation field
what_happened: orientation='portrait-primary'. On iPad Mini installed as PWA, the app forces portrait even when the user rotates the device.
what_you_expected: orientation='any' (lets the OS decide)
suggested_fix: Change to 'any'. The admin shell already responds to width via Tailwind breakpoints; landscape iPad is a strict win.

title: Missing manifest fields: id, dir, categories, prefer_related_applications
what_you_tried: Compared manifest to current spec requirements
what_happened: Missing: id (Chrome PWA identity), dir (RTL/LTR hint), categories (store discoverability), prefer_related_applications (explicit 'no native app' signal). All optional but trivial to add.
what_you_expected: All four present per the proposed manifest in the deep-dive doc.
suggested_fix: Add 'id': '/?source=pwa', 'dir': 'ltr', 'categories': ['finance','productivity','business'], 'prefer_related_applications': false. Each is one line.

title: Manifest missing screenshots — Android install bottom-sheet looks bare
what_you_tried: Reviewed Android Chrome install UI requirements
what_happened: No 'screenshots' array. Chrome on Android shows an install bottom-sheet with the manifest screenshots if present; without them, just the icon + short_name + description.
what_you_expected: 2-3 screenshots: mobile dashboard, mobile Auslagen form, optionally a desktop dashboard.
suggested_fix: Take 2 portrait shots at 1080x1920 from the existing pwa-mobile screenshot run (resize the iPhone 12 shots), put them in static/screenshots/, reference in manifest with form_factor='narrow' and 'wide' as appropriate.

title: No online/offline banner — users can't tell when submissions will fail
what_you_tried: Searched for navigator.onLine / 'online' / 'offline' event listeners
what_happened: No usage. If the user goes offline mid-form, they get a generic 'Beim Einreichen ist etwas schiefgegangen' on submit — no advance warning, no offline indicator.
what_you_expected: A subtle top-of-page banner 'Offline — Eingabe wird gespeichert und gesendet, sobald du wieder online bist' wired to navigator.onLine + 'online'/'offline' events.
suggested_fix: Add an OfflineBanner.svelte component that listens to the navigator events and renders a small fixed top banner with primary/10 background. Mount in AdminShell + auslage-einreichen layout. Goes hand-in-hand with PM-006 (Background Sync).

title: Web Push not implemented — but at this scale, intentionally so
what_you_tried: Looked for service-worker push handlers or VAPID config
what_happened: Nothing. The Kassenwart is not notified when a new Auslage arrives.
what_you_expected: At this Verein's scale, this is intentional. Mail dispatch + Audit Inbox cover the use case. Logging this finding to document the decision so it doesn't get added later as 'low-hanging fruit'.
suggested_fix: DO NOT implement Web Push. The iOS install + permission grant flow alone is more friction than it saves for 1-3 admins. Document this in the anti-list and CLAUDE.md.

title: Passkey / WebAuthn not implemented — defer to Phase 8+
what_you_tried: Looked for navigator.credentials / WebAuthn / PublicKeyCredential
what_happened: Nothing. Auth is magic-link only.
what_you_expected: At this scale, magic links are already passwordless and the device-loss recovery story for passkeys is harder than the current magic-link replay. Defer.
suggested_fix: DO NOT implement until you have >20 weekly active users. The complexity (cross-device credential sync, recovery, fallback to magic link, server-side credential storage) outweighs the convenience for the 3 admins who currently use the app.

title: Web Share API (outgoing) not used on Auslage status page
what_you_tried: Checked the status page for navigator.share usage
what_happened: No usage. An Externe who wants to forward the status URL to a co-payer has to copy/paste manually.
what_you_expected: A small 'Status teilen' button that calls navigator.share({ url, title }) with a graceful copy-to-clipboard fallback.
suggested_fix: Add a ShareButton.svelte that probes 'share' in navigator and either renders the native share affordance or falls back to navigator.clipboard.writeText. 20 lines of code.

title: No EPC 069 Giro-QR codes on Beitrags-Reminder mails / Rechnungen
what_you_tried: Inspected mail templates and Rechnung generation for EPC QR usage
what_happened: No QR codes generated. Members have to manually type IBAN + BIC + Betrag + Verwendungszweck into their banking app.
what_you_expected: Every Beitrags-Reminder mail and PDF Rechnung embeds an EPC 069 SEPA QR code that any German banking app scans → pre-fills the transfer. Cuts the friction from ~5 min to ~20 s.

title: iPad Mini install affordance only triggered by IosInstallHint and only if Safari
what_you_tried: Reviewed the iOS detection logic
what_happened: Detection: /iphone|ipad|ipod/i OR (MacIntel + maxTouchPoints>1). Then requires Safari (not Chrome/Firefox iOS). On iPadOS with Chrome installed, the hint never fires — and Chrome on iOS uses WebKit anyway, so Add-to-Home-Screen does work, just not advertised.
what_you_expected: Show a generic install hint on iOS for any browser (the gesture for Chrome iOS is similar — share menu → Add to Home Screen).
suggested_fix: Drop the Safari-only check. Show the hint on any iOS browser. The instructions ('tippe auf das Teilen-Symbol → Zum Home-Bildschirm') are correct for Chrome iOS too.

title: Bell icon in Topbar is permanently disabled
what_you_tried: Opened /app, tapped the bell icon in Topbar
what_happened: Button is disabled, aria-label 'Benachrichtigungen (demnächst)'. No future plan documented.
what_you_expected: Either ship a notification center wired to in-app events (e.g. 'Neue Auslage eingereicht', 'EÜR steht aus'), OR remove the bell.
suggested_fix: Given the anti-list excludes Web Push at this scale, an in-app notification center is plausible but not high-leverage. Recommend: REMOVE the bell. It signals capability the app doesn't have.

title: No screenshot/test asserts for shortcuts / share_target / PNG icons
what_you_tried: Read tests/e2e/pwa.spec.ts
what_happened: Tests assert manifest fields (name, short_name, display, theme_color, icons.length >= 2) and a few app.html meta tags. Doesn't catch missing shortcuts or missing PNG icons.
what_you_expected: Tests asserting: shortcuts.length >= 4, share_target exists, icons include at least one image/png, apple-touch-icon link references a .png (not .svg).
suggested_fix: Extend pwa.spec.ts with the proposed assertions. Each is a one-liner. Block regression once you've fixed PM-002 / PM-004 / PM-005.

title: /app/transactions/spenden 'Neue Spende' button overlaps title on narrow mobile
what_you_tried: Loaded /app/transactions/spenden on iPhone 12
what_happened: Title 'Spenden' (h1) and the 'Neue Spende' button sit on the same horizontal row at 390 px; the button is pushed to the right edge but the title and button feel cramped.
what_you_expected: On <sm, stack the button below the title (or use a chip variant).
suggested_fix: Wrap header in flex-col gap-3 sm:flex-row sm:items-center sm:justify-between. Apply the same pattern to other 'title + primary action' pages (Mitglieder, Rechnungen, Projekte).
